testing_tools: OWASP ZAP, Burp Suite, Custom Scripts
test_scenarios: ["Attempt to bypass MFA using replay attacks on TOTP codes","Verify JWT signature validation against Cognito JWKS using forged tokens","Attempt session fixation by reusing tokens across browser sessions","Verify secure cookie attributes (HttpOnly, Secure, SameSite) for session tokens","Test account lockout mechanism after 5 failed login attempts"]
acceptance_criteria: Zero successful bypasses; Account locks within 5 attempts; Invalid tokens rejected immediately (401)
reporting_requirements: Immediate alert to SecOps; Blocking issue for release
trend_analysis: Track frequency of brute-force attempts per month

test_scenarios: ["Vendor attempting to access Admin-only API endpoints (Vertical Escalation)","Vendor attempting to view proposals of another vendor (Horizontal Escalation)","Client attempting to modify project margin configuration","Verify @Roles decorator enforcement on all NestJS controllers","Test IDOR vulnerability on GET /api/v1/projects/{id} with unassociated user ID"]
acceptance_criteria: 100% RBAC coverage on API endpoints; 403 Forbidden returned for all unauthorized access attempts
reporting_requirements: Test coverage report included in CI pipeline artifacts

testing_tools: AWS Macie, Custom PII Injection Suite
test_scenarios: ["Upload SOW containing known PII and verify AWS Comprehend redaction accuracy","Check OpenAI prompt logs to ensure no PII is transmitted in clear text","Verify encryption at rest (AES-256) for S3 buckets storing original SOWs","Verify database columns containing sensitive vendor data are encrypted or masked","Test GDPR 'Right to be Forgotten' execution (Data Erasure) completeness"]
acceptance_criteria: Zero PII leakage in sanitized outputs; Encryption active on all storage; Redaction accuracy > 99%
reporting_requirements: PII Detection Report for every SOW processing batch

testing_tools: Stripe CLI, Custom Saga Failure Simulator
test_scenarios: ["Attempt to replay Stripe webhook events to trigger duplicate payouts","Send Stripe webhook with invalid or missing signature header","Manipulate payout amount parameters in API request payload","Force failure at 'PayoutApproved' step in Saga to verify transaction rollback","Race condition test: Approve payout simultaneously from two admin sessions"]
acceptance_criteria: Idempotency enforced on all financial endpoints; Webhook signatures strictly verified; Exact amount matching
reporting_requirements: Audit trail comparison report for every financial test run

test_scenarios: ["Upload malware-infected PDF to SOW upload endpoint","Upload executable disguised as DOCX (MIME type spoofing)","Upload file exceeding 10MB limit (DoS attempt)","Path traversal attack via filename manipulation (e.g., ../../etc/passwd)","Upload 'Zip bomb' to test decompression resource limits"]
acceptance_criteria: Malware detected and rejected; Strict file type checking (magic numbers); Size limits enforced
reporting_requirements: Security scan report for upload service

test_scenarios: ["Scan EKS container images for CVEs (Common Vulnerabilities and Exposures)","Verify Security Groups restrict RDS access to private subnets only","Attempt direct public access to private EKS nodes","Check for hardcoded secrets in environment variables/ConfigMaps","Verify OpenSearch domain allows access only from within VPC"]
acceptance_criteria: Zero Critical/High CVEs in production images; All public access blocked except LB/NAT
